name: Item Safety Stock Status
query:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY i.item_code, po.transaction_date) AS "ID:Int:80", /* Item Code only on first row */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN CONCAT('
', i.item_code, '
') ELSE '' END AS "Item Code:HTML:100", /* Item Name only on first row */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN CONCAT('
', i.item_name, '
') ELSE '' END AS "Item Name:HTML:300", /* Item Group */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN CONCAT('
', i.item_group, '
') ELSE '' END AS "Item Category:HTML:180", /* Brand */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN CONCAT('
', i.brand, '
') ELSE '' END AS "Brand:HTML:160", /* Default Supplier */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN CONCAT('
', idef.default_supplier, '
') ELSE '' END AS "Default Supplier:HTML:220", /* Safety Stock */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN i.safety_stock ELSE NULL END AS "Safety Stock::200", /* Current Qty */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) ELSE NULL END AS "Current Qty::145", /* Stock Percent */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) = 1 THEN ROUND( CASE WHEN i.safety_stock > 0 THEN (COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) / i.safety_stock) * 100 ELSE 0 END, 2) ELSE NULL END AS "Percent::120", /* Order Already Placed - Updated with Link */ CASE WHEN po.name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT( '
', po.name, '
' ) ELSE '' END AS "Order Already Placed:HTML:220", /* Order To Place */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) != 1 THEN NULL ELSE GREATEST( COALESCE(i.safety_stock, 0) - COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) - COALESCE( SUM(poi.qty - COALESCE(poi.received_qty, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code), 0 ), 0 ) END AS "Order To Place::160", /* PO Ordered Qty */ poi.qty AS "PO Qty::110", /* Received Qty */ COALESCE(poi.received_qty, 0) AS "Received Qty::140", /* Incoming Qty */ (poi.qty - COALESCE(poi.received_qty, 0)) AS "Incoming Qty::140", /* ACTION COLUMN */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) != 1 THEN '' WHEN COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) >= COALESCE(i.safety_stock, 0) THEN '
NO ACTION NEEDED
' WHEN ( COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) + COALESCE( SUM(poi.qty - COALESCE(poi.received_qty, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code), 0 ) ) >= COALESCE(i.safety_stock, 0) THEN '
NO ACTION NEEDED
' ELSE '
ACTION NEEDED
' END AS "Action:HTML:160", /* Indicator */ CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i.item_code ORDER BY po.transaction_date) != 1 THEN '' WHEN IFNULL(i.safety_stock, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) > 0 THEN '
White
' WHEN IFNULL(i.safety_stock, 0) = 0 THEN '
Black
' WHEN ( (COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) / NULLIF(i.safety_stock, 0)) * 100 ) <= 0 THEN '
Black
' WHEN ( (COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) / NULLIF(i.safety_stock, 0)) * 100 ) < 33 THEN '
Red
' WHEN ( (COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) / NULLIF(i.safety_stock, 0)) * 100 ) < 66 THEN '
Yellow
' WHEN ( (COALESCE(b.current_qty, 0) / NULLIF(i.safety_stock, 0)) * 100 ) <= 100 THEN '
Green
' ELSE '
White
' END AS "Indicator:HTML:100" FROM `tabItem` i LEFT JOIN ( SELECT item_code, SUM(actual_qty) AS current_qty FROM `tabBin` GROUP BY item_code ) b ON b.item_code = i.item_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT parent AS item_code, default_supplier FROM `tabItem Default` ) idef ON idef.item_code = i.item_code LEFT JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` poi ON poi.item_code = i.item_code AND (poi.qty - COALESCE(poi.received_qty, 0)) > 0 LEFT JOIN `tabPurchase Order` po ON po.name = poi.parent AND po.docstatus = 1 AND po.status NOT IN ('Closed', 'Completed') WHERE i.disabled = 0 AND i.is_stock_item = 1 ORDER BY i.item_code, po.transaction_date;

name: Stock Levels
query:
SELECT 
    b.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:350",
    SUM(b.actual_qty) AS "Total Qty:Float:350",
    SUM(b.stock_value) AS "Total Stock Value:Currency:500"
FROM 
    tabBin b
WHERE 
    b.actual_qty > 0
GROUP BY 
    b.item_code
ORDER BY 
    b.item_code;
